headline: Last dry window — act on scapes and aphids today
weather_notes: Storms arrive tonight (86%) and continue Sunday (99%) and Monday (90%) — any Bt applied after today washes off before it works.
Sunday expected to drop 0.25–0.5 in. of rain; skip irrigation through at least Tuesday.
Overnight lows hold 36–40°F all week — well above frost threshold, no covers needed.
Heavy rain through Monday will spike slug pressure; check w1 after storms clear.

surfaced_tasks.title: Check hardneck garlic for scapes
surfaced_tasks.reason: Due tomorrow and today is the last dry window before multi-day storms start tonight.

surfaced_tasks.title: Inspect for aphids — apply Bt if caterpillars present
surfaced_tasks.reason: Due Monday but storms arrive tonight — today is the only remaining effective Bt window, 8 days before harvest.
